category_sources: source_facts.description says cpm is a fast CPAN module installer; official README calls it a fast CPAN module installer/client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpm; MetaCPAN and official GitHub repository use the project name cpm.
docs_sources: MetaCPAN pod page is the official CPAN documentation surface and links the official repository; GitHub README contains install and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; MetaCPAN project links both Homepage and Repository to https://github.com/skaji/cpm.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CPAN module installation; official README describes dependency preparation and installation behavior.
